tools.name: DSPy
tools.description: Stanford NLP framework for programming (not prompting) language models. Replaces manual prompt engineering with automated optimization using declarative modules and signatures.

tools.name: Promptfoo
tools.description: Open-source CLI and library for evaluating and red-teaming LLM apps. Supports 90+ model providers and 67+ security attack plugins. Now maintained by OpenAI.

tools.name: LangSmith
tools.description: Developer platform by LangChain for building, monitoring, debugging, testing, and optimizing LLM-powered applications. Deep integration with LangChain ecosystem.

tools.name: Langfuse
tools.description: Open-source LLM engineering platform for observability, prompt management, evaluation, and debugging. Self-hostable with MIT license.
tools.pricing: Free (50k units/mo) / Core $29/mo / Pro $199/mo / Enterprise $2,499/mo / Self-host free

tools.name: Braintrust
tools.description: AI observability platform for building quality AI products. Features Loop, an AI assistant that automatically optimizes prompts.
tools.target_audience: AI product teams, engineers, product managers

tools.name: PromptLayer
tools.description: Prompt management platform with Git-like version control, A/B testing, and no-code editing. HIPAA compliant.
tools.pricing: Free (5k requests/mo) / Pro $50/user/mo / Team $150/mo (5 users) / Enterprise custom

tools.name: Humanloop
tools.description: Enterprise-grade AI evaluation platform with prompt management, version control, and LLM observability.
tools.pricing: Free / Pro $50/user/mo / Team $150/mo (5 users) / Enterprise custom

tools.name: Helicone
tools.description: Open-source LLM observability platform with AI Gateway. Supports 100+ providers with intelligent routing and caching.
tools.pricing: Free (10k requests/mo) / Paid tiers available / Self-host available

tools.name: Maxim AI
tools.description: End-to-end evaluation and observability platform for shipping AI agents. Includes Playground++ for prompt engineering.

tools.name: Orq.ai
tools.description: Generative AI collaboration platform for building, deploying, and monitoring LLM apps with prompt management.

tools.name: Agenta
tools.description: Open-source LLMOps platform for prompt management, evaluation, and observability. SOC 2 compliant.
tools.pricing: Free tier / Cloud paid plans / Self-host free
tools.target_audience: AI developers, teams wanting self-hosted solutions

tools.name: PromptPerfect
tools.description: Automated prompt optimizer using reinforcement learning. Supports multiple AI models including GPT-4, ChatGPT, and Midjourney.
tools.target_audience: Content creators, casual users, prompt engineers

tools.name: Latitude
tools.description: Open-source agent engineering platform for building and operating LLM features in production. Uses PromptL language.
tools.target_audience: AI developers, teams building production LLM apps

tools.name: Arize Phoenix
tools.description: Open-source AI observability and evaluation platform with prompt management. Self-hostable with no feature gates.
tools.pricing: Free open source / Cloud plans available

tools.name: AutoPrompt
tools.description: Framework for automatic prompt tuning using Intent-based Prompt Calibration. Iteratively builds edge-case datasets and optimizes prompts.

tools.name: Opik (by Comet)
tools.description: Agent optimizer with 7 algorithms for automated prompt engineering. Uses Bayesian optimization for parameter tuning.

tools.name: Vertex AI Prompt Optimizer
tools.description: Google Cloud's iterative LLM-based optimization algorithm for finding the best prompt for any model.

tools.name: OpenAI Prompt Optimizer
tools.description: Built-in chat interface in OpenAI dashboard for optimizing prompts according to best practices. Pairs with datasets.

tools.name: PrompTessor
tools.description: AI prompt analysis and optimization tool with detailed metrics and actionable optimization variations.
key_features: 6 detailed metrics (Clarity, Specificity, Context, Goal Orientation, Structure, Constraints)

tools.name: Mirascope
tools.description: Lightweight Python library for structured prompt engineering with strong type safety and automated optimization.
